{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/8711456?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DarkaMaul/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DarkaMaul/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DarkaMaul/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DarkaMaul/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/DarkaMaul", "id": 8711456, "login": "DarkaMaul", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg3MTE0NTY=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DarkaMaul/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DarkaMaul/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DarkaMaul/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DarkaMaul/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DarkaMaul/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/DarkaMaul", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-674", "name": "Uncontrolled Recursion"}], "description": "The SurrealDB value and JSON parser did not enforce the configured recursion depth limit when parsing nested `{`, `[`, or `(` tokens. The expression parser already enforced the limit for these tokens; the value/JSON parser omitted it. An unauthenticated attacker could send a deeply nested JSON payload to the WebSocket `/rpc` endpoint and exhaust server memory, crashing the process.

This is an incomplete fix for [GHSA-6r8p-hpg7-825g](https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb/security/advisories/GHSA-6r8p-hpg7-825g), which addressed the same class of bug in the expression parser but did not cover the value/JSON parser code path.

### Impact

An unauthenticated remote attacker can crash a SurrealDB server with a single WebSocket message. No credentials or query execution privileges are required.

### Patches

A patch enforces the configured recursion depth limit in `parse_value` and `parse_json`, bringing them in line with the rest of the parser.

- Versions 3.1.0 and later are not affected by this issue.

### Workarounds

Restrict network access to the WebSocket `/rpc` endpoint to trusted clients.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-q729-696q-g9pq", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-01T20:03:33Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q729-696q-g9pq", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-q729-696q-g9pq"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-01T20:03:33Z", "references": ["https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb/security/advisories/GHSA-q729-696q-g9pq", "https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb/commit/1bd9826f477f4089134460dc5574b6f4e6916973", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q729-696q-g9pq"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/surrealdb/surrealdb/security-advisories/GHSA-q729-696q-g9pq", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb", "summary": "SurrealDB has Denial of Service in JSON parser due to nested objects", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-01T20:03:34Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-q729-696q-g9pq", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.1.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "surrealdb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.1.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: SurrealDB has Denial of Service in JSON parser due to nested objects
